acceptanceReviewed.criterion: The qd workflow documents spec/<node-id> as the current default branch convention.
The general orchestration runbook tells agents to inspect both current spec/ and historical qd/ branches.
The implementor prompt uses spec/<node-id> instead of qd/<node-id>-short-topic.

Scope excludes qd behavior changes, historical evidence/report/branch rewrites, product runtime, capture, encode, transport, decode, render, presentation, cross-device, latency, Mac hardware, workflow dispatch, and credential-dependent claims.

realWorldValidation.evidence: This is a qd workflow documentation alignment node and does not require product runtime, capture, encode, transport, decode, render, presentation, cross-device, latency, Mac hardware, workflow dispatch, or credential-dependent validation.
